title: [Sentry] NullPointerException: Cannot invoke method getId() on null object
description:
## java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke method getId() on null object

**Sentry Issue:** https://sentry.io/organizations/myorg/issues/4444444/

**Culprit:** com.myorg.payments.PaymentProcessor in processPayment

**Times seen:** 33
**Environment:** production

### Stacktrace

```
java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke method getId() on null object
	at com.myorg.payments.PaymentProcessor.processPayment(PaymentProcessor.java:142)
	at com.myorg.api.PaymentController.createPayment(PaymentController.java:88)
	at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method)
	at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62)
	at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:498)
Caused by: com.myorg.gateway.GatewayException: Gateway returned null response
	at com.myorg.gateway.GatewayClient.call(GatewayClient.java:55)
	at com.myorg.payments.PaymentProcessor.callGateway(PaymentProcessor.java:178)
	at com.myorg.payments.PaymentProcessor.processPayment(PaymentProcessor.java:140)
```
